title: Visual+
description: Project for just fun visuals for your Minecraft PVP
body:
# 🌟 Visual+ — The Ultimate PvP & Utility Mod

Turn your PvP experience into a visual masterpiece. **Visual+** (formerly Trail Mod) combines stunning cosmetics with powerful combat utilities to give you the edge in any battle.

---

## 🎯 Advanced Projectile System
Master your aim with next-gen trajectory prediction and visualization.

### 🏹 Projectile Tracer
Never miss a shot again. See exactly where your arrows, potions, and tridents will land before you even fire.
*   **Real-time Trajectory**: A precise line shows the flight path of your projectile.
*   **Impact Prediction**: Know exactly where it hits—block or entity.
*   **Customization**: Toggle the line on/off, change colors, or use Rainbow mode.
*   **Styles**: Choose between **Solid**, **Dashed**, or **Dotted** lines.

![Projectile Tracer](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1471741358728548375/1473996989682159739/image.png?ex=69983e2b&is=6996ecab&hm=f260cbdd488cf2ad5b0ce0ea99a3dce27250d063b569a5dd45988e83d6036455&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=2106&height=1368)
![Projectile Tracer](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1471741358728548375/1473997037925040262/image.png?ex=69983e37&is=6996ecb7&hm=70b013616cdb2bebc660dc6ccd35190dd573c9478ec6ee808253aae88cd11516&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=2106&height=1368)
### 🔮 Ender Pearl Prediction
Track pearls like a pro.
*   **Self-Prediction**: See where your own pearl will land to perfect your clutches.
*   **Enemy Prediction**: Automatically tracks and visualizes the path of enemy pearls in the air.
*   **Impact Styles**:
    *   **Sphere**: A clean, 3D wireframe sphere at the landing spot.
    *   **Beacon**: A vertical beam of light marking the destination.
    *   **Target**: Concentric rings for precise landing.
    *   **Main**: Standard box or hexagon markers.

!Sorry photo of this function will be add soon...

---

## 🛡️ Combat Intelligence
Information is power. Visual+ gives you the data you need to win.

### 🛡️ Shield Direction Pointer
Visualize your opponent's defense.
*   **Blocking Arcs**: Draws a 3D arc showing the exact angle an enemy is blocking.
*   **Styles**:
    *   **Energy Shield**: A translucent barrier effect.
    *   **Gradient**: Smooth fading arc.
    *   **Simple**: Clean lines for minimal distraction.
*   **X-Ray Mode**: See blocking directions through walls to plan your approach.

!Sorry photo of this function will be add soon...

### ⚔️ Hitbox Visualization
Stop guessing, start hitting.
*   **Dynamic Health Colors**: Hitboxes shift from **Green** (High HP) to **Red** (Low HP) in real-time.
*   **Permanent Mode**: Option to keep hitboxes visible at all times.
*   **Entity Highlight**: Enemies are highlighted when your projectile trajectory intersects them.

![Hitbox Visualization](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1471741358728548375/1473997694145138709/image.png?ex=69983ed3&is=6996ed53&hm=d324e4ae12de23ab66390d3ed25405f63c2e5942a6999463705367257c6f8385&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=2106&height=1368)

### 📏 Spacing & Reach
*   **Spacing Circle**: A precise radius indicator to help you maintain perfect combo distance.
*   **W-Tap Indicator**: Visual feedback to perfect your sprint-reset timing.

---

## ✨ Cosmetics & Aura
Dominate with style.

### 🏃 Movement Trails
Leave your mark on the world.
*   **Styles**: Solid steps, dashed lines, or smooth ribbons.
*   **Customization**: Adjust length, opacity, and width.
*   **Rainbow Mode**: Cycle through the entire spectrum as you move.

![Movement Trails](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1471741358728548375/1473997151641014483/image.png?ex=69983e52&is=6996ecd2&hm=e88e88a6f0336fe70f4ac86e27e2b808dd0eda07675c05d10f0aa8128c028a01&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=2106&height=1368)

### 🦅 Elytra Aerodynamic Trails
Fly like a jet.
*   **Wing Tip Trails**: Realistic trails spawning from the tips of your wings.
*   **Dynamic Folding**: Trails follow the exact movement of your wings as they fold and unfold based on your velocity.
*   **Boost FX**: Intensified trails when using fireworks for that "afterburner" look.
*   **Precision Calibration**: Use the in-game GUI to perfectly align trails with your specific elytra model.

### 🎩 China Hat & 3D Geometry
Wear your crown.
*   **Models**: China Hat (Cone), Pyramid, Halo, or Cylinder.
*   **Animations**: Customizable **Spin Speed**, **Bobbing**, and **Tilt**.
*   **First-Person Visibility**: Choose if you want to see your own hat.

![China Hat Cosmetics](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1471741358728548375/1473997210625507388/image.png?ex=69983e60&is=6996ece0&hm=7a23ac3cc3495f0790f90469ce971c857b57a2c9835910cf756a96c69830f8a5&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=2106&height=1368)

### 🌊 Landing Effects & Ripples
Make an impact.
*   **Ripple**: Expanding rings when you hit the ground.
*   **Shapes**: Circles, Squares, Hexagons, or complex patterns.

---

## ⚙️ Configuration
Complete control at your fingertips.
*   **Instant Access**: Press **Right Shift** (default) or use Mod Menu to open settings.
*   **Toggle Everything**: Master switches for every module.
*   **Clean UI**: Organized, easy-to-use menu with tooltips.

![Configuration Menu](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1471741358728548375/1473997365701771339/image.png?ex=69983e85&is=6996ed05&hm=e5343178804328fd75606dbd09300efa74746621280ebe23769269851dd62e4f&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=2106&height=1368)
